message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluent-bit-593-use-system-time-offset-for-local-datetimes",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluent-bit: Use system time offset for local datetimes",
+    "description": "Use system time offset for local datetimes. Requested by 31+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current fluent-bit deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your fluent-bit version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nhelm list -n fluent-bit 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working fluent-bit installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluent-bit configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit\n```\nThe `Time_Offset` parameter allows to add a fixed UTC offset to local datetimes."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Use system time offset for local datetimes",
+        "description": "I found a workaround that uses the configured timezone, e.g. \"Europe/Berlin\" at the time of parsing the log entry.\n\n* Use a lua filter to parse the timestamp\n* Use a linux distribution that fully supports timezone information (ulibc does not work)\n* Configure the timezone to use to parse at the\n```yaml\nRun container with env set:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade fluent-bit to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade fluent-bit:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade fluent-bit fluent-bit/fluent-bit --namespace fluent-bit\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit\nhelm list -n fluent-bit\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Use system time offset for local datetimes\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I found a workaround that uses the configured timezone, e.g. \"Europe/Berlin\" at the time of parsing the log entry.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Run container with env set:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
